goal: Forklift→arm depalletize handoff: a wheeled-robot proxy ('Forklift') with a raised dummy platform Xform navigates to a handoff zone carrying a Pallet slab loaded with 3 small workpiece cubes. The forklift signals 'ready' via handoff:state='placed' on a HandoffMarker prim. A stationary Franka arm depalletizes each item from the pallet → outfeed conveyor (adjacent to the marker). After all 3 items have moved, handoff:state is toggled to 'complete' and the forklift navigates 2.0 m back to its depot pose. Realizes industrial-forklift-handoff-arm-001 (Phase 8 industrial-asset). Forklift Nucleus asset is unavailable; this canonical uses the wheeled-robot+raised-Xform proxy specified by A90.
thoughts: Pattern hint=pick_place. Success criterion is workpiece-delivered-to-final-destination (the outfeed conveyor); the forklift navigate + handoff handshake are structural features stacked on top of the depalletize base pattern. This is the same pattern_hint as A42 vision-depalletize, but the geometric source is a mobile pallet on a forklift proxy rather than a fixed pallet.

Differentiation from A67 (CP-NEW-cart-handoff-amr): A67 is arm-RELEASES-cart-onto-AMR-that-departs (pattern_hint=navigate; success = AMR at goal pose). A90 is forklift-ARRIVES-WITH-PALLET-and-arm-DEPALLETIZES (pattern_hint=pick_place; success = items on outfeed). Distinct topology: A67 single cart transfer + AMR-driven success; A90 multi-item depalletize + arm-driven success.

Differentiation from A42 (CP-NEW-vision-depalletize): A42 has a STATIC pallet at fixed [0, 0.50, 0.775], no mobile robot, no handoff signal, vision-guided picks (vision_detect_objects + compute_stack_placement). A90 has a MOBILE pallet riding on a forklift proxy that navigated in, handoff handshake gates the depalletize, no vision tools — pose-known picks. Tool overlap with A42 is minimal: A90 omits vision/grid tools; A42 omits navigate/handoff.

Forklift proxy construction: create_wheeled_robot at /World/Forklift (drive=differential, wheel_radius=0.05, wheel_base=0.20 — larger than a Jetbot to read as a forklift footprint). A child Xform '/World/Forklift/Platform' represents the raised forks at platform_z ≈ 0.45 m above the floor (typical forklift fork height with a pallet on it). The Pallet cube is co-placed above the platform Xform; pallet-rides-on-forklift is approximated by static co-placement (same caveat as A67), since differential-drive proxies don't expose a real forks-prismatic-joint. failure_modes documents this.

Pallet + items layout: Pallet at [1.0, 0, 0.475] scale [0.30, 0.20, 0.025] — pallet half-extents 0.30×0.20×0.025 m, top surface at z=0.500. Three 0.08 m cube workpieces ride on the pallet top at z=0.540 (pallet_top + cube_half=0.04), arranged in a 1×3 row at x ∈ {-0.10, 0, +0.10} relative to the pallet center, all at pallet_y=0. After forklift arrives at handoff pose, the pallet world position is [1.0, 0, 0.475] (same depot pose used at build time — the forklift starts already AT the handoff zone in this canonical to keep the canonical short; the navigate-back-to-depot at the end demonstrates the navigate axis).

Franka arm placement: robot_wizard franka at [0, 0, 0.75] (on a 0.75 m table). Pallet at [1.0, 0, 0.475] means horizontal distance from Franka base = 1.0 m. Franka reach is 0.85 m, so the FAR corner of the pallet (x=1.30, y=±0.10) is OUTSIDE reach — this is the 'arm reach insufficient for far-corner items' failure mode the task asks to document. The 3-item row sits at x ∈ {0.90, 1.00, 1.10} from the robot base, all within reach for the items themselves. Far-corner reach concern is documented but NOT a build-time failure.

Outfeed conveyor: a static cube fixture at [0, -0.50, 0.78] scale [0.40, 0.30, 0.03] — within easy Franka reach (0.50 m from base). Drop-pose is [0, -0.50, 0.85] (above conveyor surface). No actual surface velocity is applied — the task is depalletize-to-static-outfeed, the 'conveyor' is a fixture for the drop zone semantics; a real implementation would apply create_conveyor here, but the canonical keeps it locally-runnable with a plain cube.

Handoff handshake: setup_robot_handoff_signal('/World/HandoffMarker') with robot_a=/World/Forklift, robot_b=/World/Franka. State machine documented in code: 'idle' → 'placed' (forklift signals 'pallet ready') → 'complete' (arm signals 'all items moved'). The final navigate_to fires after state='complete' to send the forklift back to depot at [-1.0, 0]. The handoff toggle inside the canonical is unconditional (no polling); a real controller would gate the depalletize loop on state=='placed'. Documented in failure_modes.

setup_pick_place_controller: target_source='native' (mature path), source_paths is the 3-item list in fixed pick order (near→far: item at x=0.90 first, x=1.00, x=1.10 last), destination_path=/World/Outfeed. drop_targets dict maps each source to the same drop pose [0, -0.50, 0.85]. No sensor_path (free-run). End-effector offset uses the verified [0, 0.005, 0] default from native mode.

Function-gate criterion: after 240 s, all 3 workpieces are within xy_tolerance=0.18 m of /World/Outfeed center [0, -0.50, *]. Generous tolerance because outfeed surface is 0.40×0.30 m and 3 items may stack loosely; lower tolerance would force tight stacking semantics that this canonical does not enforce.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.025], scale=[10.0, 10.0, 0.05])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Franka arm on a 0.75 m table (stationary depalletizer) ───────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[1, 0, 0, 0],
)

# ── Forklift proxy — wheeled robot with a raised platform Xform ──────────────
# Nucleus forklift asset is unavailable (A90 brief: "locally-runnable proxy").
# Differential-drive footprint with larger wheel base reads as forklift-class.
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Forklift", prim_type="Xform")
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Forklift", schema_name="PhysicsArticulationRootAPI")
create_wheeled_robot(
    robot_path="/World/Forklift",
    drive_type="differential",
    wheel_radius=0.05,
    wheel_base=0.20,
)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Forklift", attr_name="xformOp:translate", value=[1.0, 0, 0.05])

setup_nav_robot(
    robot_path="/World/Forklift",
    nav_topic="/forklift/cmd_vel",
    odom_topic="/forklift/odom",
)

# Raised dummy platform Xform — represents the forks at typical pallet-carry height.
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Forklift/Platform", prim_type="Xform", position=[0, 0, 0.45])

# ── Pallet slab — co-placed above the forklift platform ──────────────────────
# Pallet top z = 0.475 + 0.025 = 0.500. Static co-placement (no FixedJoint) —
# differential-drive proxy has no real fork joint; pallet rides by friction.
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Pallet",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[1.0, 0, 0.475],
    scale=[0.30, 0.20, 0.025],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pallet", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── 3 workpiece cubes (0.08 m) in a single row on the pallet top ─────────────
# Cube centre z = 0.500 + 0.04 = 0.540. Row offsets in pallet-local x: -0.10, 0, +0.10.
# World x = 1.0 + offset → {0.90, 1.00, 1.10}.
# Far item (x=1.10) is at horizontal distance 1.10 m from Franka base — outside
# Franka 0.85 m reach if not accounting for table height. Documented in failure_modes.
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Item_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.90, 0, 0.540], size=0.08)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Item_1", schema_name=api)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Item_2", prim_type="Cube", position=[1.00, 0, 0.540], size=0.08)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Item_2", schema_name=api)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Item_3", prim_type="Cube", position=[1.10, 0, 0.540], size=0.08)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Item_3", schema_name=api)

# ── Outfeed conveyor (static cube acts as drop fixture) ──────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Outfeed",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, -0.50, 0.78],
    scale=[0.40, 0.30, 0.03],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Outfeed", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Depot pose marker (where forklift returns after handoff) ─────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Depot",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[-1.0, 0, 0.025],
    scale=[0.30, 0.30, 0.05],
)

# ── Handoff signal — gates the depalletize loop and the forklift departure ──
setup_robot_handoff_signal(
    handoff_path="/World/HandoffMarker",
    position=[0.6, 0, 0.55],
    robot_a="/World/Forklift",
    robot_b="/World/Franka",
)

# Forklift is at the handoff zone; signal: pallet is ready for depalletize.
create_prim(prim_path="/World/HandoffMarker", prim_type="Xform")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/HandoffMarker", attr_name="handoff:state", value="placed")

# Pre-check before scheduling the depalletize
prim_exists(prim_path="/World/Forklift")
get_world_transform(prim_path="/World/Pallet")

# ── Franka depalletize: 3 items → outfeed (near→far order) ──────────────────
# native target_source. drop_targets uses one drop pose per item (same point).
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="native",
    source_paths=["/World/Item_1", "/World/Item_2", "/World/Item_3"],
    destination_path="/World/Outfeed",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Item_1": [0, -0.50, 0.85],
        "/World/Item_2": [0, -0.50, 0.85],
        "/World/Item_3": [0, -0.50, 0.85],
    },
    end_effector_offset=[0, 0.005, 0],
)

# Arm signals completion; forklift departs.
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/HandoffMarker", attr_name="handoff:state", value="complete")

navigate_to(
    robot_path="/World/Forklift",
    target_position=[-1.0, 0.0],
    planner="direct",
)
extension_notes: First canonical to combine a wheeled-robot forklift proxy + setup_robot_handoff_signal + arm depalletize in one scene. Nucleus forklift asset is unavailable (blocker `nucleus_only_asset` per docs/research/2026-05-16-A55-canonical.md). A90 brief explicitly authorizes the wheeled-robot+platform-Xform proxy. Distinct from A67 (cart-handoff-amr: pattern_hint=navigate, AMR-driven success) and A42 (vision-depalletize: static pallet, no mobile robot, vision tools).
failure_modes: Pallet rides on forklift via static co-placement, not a FixedJoint — the differential-drive wheeled-robot proxy exposes no forks-prismatic-joint, so the pallet is co-placed above the raised /World/Forklift/Platform Xform and stays put by friction. If the forklift accelerates sharply (rare in this canonical, which only navigates once at the end), the pallet may slide. Mitigation: a create_articulated_joint FixedJoint between /World/Pallet and /World/Forklift after handoff:state='placed' would make this robust. Documented but not applied to keep the canonical short.

Far-corner items on the pallet are outside Franka reach — /World/Item_3 at x=1.10 is at horizontal distance 1.10 m from the Franka base, which exceeds the 0.85 m nominal reach. With the table at z=0.75 and items at z=0.540 (below the base), the planar reach for this z is even tighter. native target_source may reject the IK for Item_3 at build time. Mitigation: move the pallet closer (pallet x=0.85 instead of 1.0) OR use a longer-reach arm (UR10, reach 1.30 m). Documented but accepted at current geometry.

Pallet height variance breaks fixed pick-z — the canonical assumes pallet_top=0.500 (pallet z=0.475 + half_extent=0.025). If the pallet is replaced with a different size (e.g. EUR-pallet 0.144 m thick) the items sit at a different z and the native pick fails. A real implementation would call get_bounding_box('/World/Pallet') and compute item z dynamically. Mitigation: parameterise pallet_thickness in role_defaults; documented.

Handoff signal race — forklift could depart before the arm has picked the last item if the navigate_to fires too early. In this canonical the navigate_to is sequenced AFTER setup_pick_place_controller registers the cycle, but setup_pick_place_controller is async (returns immediately while the controller runs over many physics ticks). The set_attribute('complete') and navigate_to fire BEFORE the last item lands on the outfeed. A real controller would poll item-on-outfeed state and only then issue 'complete'. Documented as the 'race' failure mode A90 brief asks to flag.

Forklift platform sag during transit — N/A in this canonical (forklift only navigates at the END, with pallet already empty), but a real forklift-with-load transit may sag if PhysX mass/damping defaults are wrong. Documented for future canonicals that add a navigate-IN phase.

Outfeed is a static cube, not a moving conveyor — A90 brief says 'outfeed conveyor' but the canonical uses a static cube fixture for the drop zone. A real implementation would call create_conveyor with surface_velocity to carry items downstream. Items stack at the same drop point in this canonical. Documented; create_conveyor is the upgrade path.

create_wheeled_robot at empty path — Forklift is created via create_wheeled_robot without a prior articulation reference. On Kit, the handler synthesizes a Jetbot-like primitive shape (not a forklift mesh). The canonical readme treats the shape as semantic-only (proxy for footprint), not visually accurate. Documented; the proper backing would be the warehouse_with_forklifts.usd Nucleus asset (Environments/...), which is the blocker `nucleus_only_asset` flagged in A55.
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.025], scale=[10.0, 10.0, 0.05])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{static_arm.class}},
    dest_path={{static_arm.path}},
    position={{static_arm.position}},
    orientation={{static_arm.orientation}},
)

create_wheeled_robot(
    robot_path={{forklift.path}},
    drive_type={{forklift.drive_type}},
    wheel_radius={{forklift.wheel_radius}},
    wheel_base={{forklift.wheel_base}},
)
set_attribute(prim_path={{forklift.path}}, attr_name="xformOp:translate", value={{forklift.start_position}})

setup_nav_robot(
    robot_path={{forklift.path}},
    nav_topic="/forklift/cmd_vel",
    odom_topic="/forklift/odom",
)

create_prim(prim_path={{forklift.platform_path}}, prim_type="Xform", position={{forklift.platform_offset}})

create_prim(
    prim_path={{pallet.path}},
    prim_type="Cube",
    position={{pallet.position}},
    scale={{pallet.scale}},
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{pallet.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size={{workpieces[0].size}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size={{workpieces[1].size}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size={{workpieces[2].size}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)

create_prim(
    prim_path={{outfeed.path}},
    prim_type="Cube",
    position={{outfeed.position}},
    scale={{outfeed.scale}},
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{outfeed.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_prim(
    prim_path={{depot.path}},
    prim_type="Cube",
    position={{depot.position}},
    scale={{depot.scale}},
)

setup_robot_handoff_signal(
    handoff_path={{handoff_marker.path}},
    position={{handoff_marker.position}},
    robot_a={{forklift.path}},
    robot_b={{static_arm.path}},
)

set_attribute(prim_path={{handoff_marker.path}}, attr_name="handoff:state", value="placed")

prim_exists(prim_path={{forklift.path}})
get_world_transform(prim_path={{pallet.path}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{static_arm.path}},
    target_source="native",
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}],
    destination_path={{outfeed.path}},
    drop_targets={
        {{workpieces[0].path}}: {{outfeed.drop_pose}},
        {{workpieces[1].path}}: {{outfeed.drop_pose}},
        {{workpieces[2].path}}: {{outfeed.drop_pose}},
    },
    end_effector_offset=[0, 0.005, 0],
)

set_attribute(prim_path={{handoff_marker.path}}, attr_name="handoff:state", value="complete")

navigate_to(
    robot_path={{forklift.path}},
    target_position={{forklift.depot_position}},
    planner="direct",
)
